summary: 9 unread this Saturday morning, nothing needing a direct reply. Still the most urgent: that Texas registration reminder from January is still sitting unread — your 2014 Mazda reg expired December 2025 and you're now 3+ months overdue, handle it today. TSO has an Easter sale ending tomorrow (10% off). Your Google Fi bill for $168.32 auto-pays April 13, and a Steam purchase receipt addressed to bubbyrck@yahoo.com landed here — make sure that was expected.
